# HDSP — Home Domestic Services Provider
> Karachi's most trusted domestic staffing agency. NADRA-verified maids, home cooks, nannies, and family drivers with police clearance and 30-day replacement guarantee.

## Services
- Maid Service: https://hdsp.pk/maid-service
- Home Cook Service: https://hdsp.pk/home-cook-service
- Babysitting & Nanny Service: https://hdsp.pk/babysitting-service
- Driver Service: https://hdsp.pk/driver-service

## Areas Served
- DHA, Karachi: https://hdsp.pk/area/dha
- Clifton, Karachi: https://hdsp.pk/area/clifton
- Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi: https://hdsp.pk/area/gulshan

## Contact
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/923358172235
- Phone: 0335-8172235

## About
HDSP verifies every staff member through CNIC/NADRA confirmation, police clearance, reference checks, professional training, and issues a QR-linked verified ID card. All placements come with a 30-day replacement guarantee.
